items.headline: Claude Code adds glob deny rules for MCP tools
items.body: Claude Code 2.1.166 adds glob pattern support to MCP tool deny rules — `"*"` now locks out all tools from a server, and narrower patterns restrict specific operations without touching server code. Good for ADO MCP: client-side config can now scope down which Azure DevOps operations are exposed, no server patch needed. The same release adds `fallbackModel` for automatic failover to up to three backup models, relevant for any unattended ADO workflow that can't stall on a model outage.
